title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Tata Housing

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Tata Housing
jsonLd.description:
Tata Housing has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Housing:
Tata Housing is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Housing!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
